meaning: n.粗磨粉,粗面粉,粗燕麦粉,<美>粗玉米粉
examples: I want grits with my eggs instead of hash browns.
Lincoln moves forward and grits his teeth, "it was dad..." Michael says that it's not possible.
The winner takes the spoils, but the loser is not crushed: he grits his teeth and vows to try harder next time.
To her credit, the lady knight shrugs off his barbs and grits her teeth.
It was held under cotenancy agreements which were placed in Grantor Retained Income Trusts (GRITs).
